page_metadata.biotools__summary: Open source and high-performance HTML5 web-based genome browser. It allows to browse several genomes and annotations by fetching data from CellBase high-performance REST web services. Custom data (BAMs, VCFs, ...) can also be loaded from remote servers and local disk by using OpenCGA server.
